title: ER Visit — Chest Pain
text: Patient Mr. Rao, 58 years old male, presented with chest pain and shortness of breath on 12/07/2025. Diagnosed with coronary artery disease. ECG abnormal. He was started on atorvastatin 40 mg once daily and aspirin 75 mg once daily. Discharged on 14/07/2025 with advice for angioplasty.

title: Fever & Cough — OPD
text: Pt. Sharma (female, age 32 yrs) complains of fever and cough since 3 days. Chest X-ray suggests pneumonia. Prescribed amoxicillin 500 mg tid po for 5 days. Follow-up on Jul 20, 2025.

title: Diabetes Management
text: Assessment: diabetes mellitus and hypertension. Started on metformin 500 mg bd and insulin 10 units sc at night. Admitted on 10/07/2025 for glucose stabilization; discharged on 13/07/2025.
